intro: Exothostemon speciosus, also known as the "Kakadu Plum", is a small tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of Australia. It is valued for its rich source of vitamin C and its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the prevention of diseases such as scurvy and certain types of cancer.
